zh.Thorpe Waterville, Northamptonshire, Eng: 英國諾薩普頓史爾索普 沃特維爾
zh.Hurstmonceux Castle, Hailsham, Sussex, E: 英國英格蘭素可海爾善姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Holand於大約1404年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾索普 沃特維爾時，她的父親John de Holand59歲，母親Margaret46歲。她於1422年之前與Sir Roger Fiennes結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1441年4月在英國素可享年38歲。

zh-hans.Thorpe Waterville, Northamptonshire, Eng: 英国諾薩普頓史爾索普 沃特維爾
zh-hans.Hurstmonceux Castle, Hailsham, Sussex, E: 英国英格兰素可海爾善姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Holand于大约1404年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾索普 沃特維爾时，她的父亲John de Holand59岁，母亲Margaret46岁。她于1422年之前与Sir Roger Fiennes结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1441年4月在英国素可享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Holand
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Holland  .
Norwegian: habitational name from about twenty farmsteads so named, composed of Old Norse hár ‘high’ + land ‘land, field’, denoting a high-lying farm.

variants.name: Holland
meanings: English, German, Dutch, Danish, Norwegian, Swedish, French, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Holland, a province of the Netherlands.

English: habitational name from Downholland or Upholland (Lancashire), Hulland (Derbyshire), the Parts of Holland, one of the three administrative subdivisions of Lincolnshire, any of the four places called Hoyland (southern Yorkshire), and possibly Great and Little Holland (Essex). The placenames all derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + land ‘land’.

English: habitational name either from Hoeland (Farm) in Bury (Sussex), or from Holland's Barn in Albourne (Sussex). The placename in Bury has the same etymology as in 1 above, while the placename in Albourne may derive from Old English hol ‘hole, hollow’ + land ‘land’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Holand was born about 1404, in Thorpe Waterville, Northamptonshire, England, her father, John de Holand, was 59 and her mother, Margaret, was 46. She married Sir Roger Fiennes before 1422. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in April 1441, in Sussex, England, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Holand est née environ 1404, à Thorpe Waterville, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Holand, avait 59 ans et sa mère, Margaret, avait 46 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Roger Fiennes avant 1422. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en avril 1441, à Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Holand um 1404 in Thorpe Waterville, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Holand 59 und ihre Mutter Margaret 46. Sie hat vor 1422 Sir Roger Fiennes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im April 1441 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Sussex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Holand è nata il circa 1404 nel Thorpe Waterville, Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, John de Holand, aveva 59 anni e sua madre, Margaret, aveva 46 anni. Lei sposato Sir Roger Fiennes prima del 1422. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel aprile 1441, nel Sussex, England, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Holandが約1404年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアソルペ ワテルヴィルで生まれた時，父John de Holandは59歳，母Margaretは46歳であった。1422年以前にSir Roger Fiennesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1441年4月にイギリススセックスで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Holand(이)가 대략 1404년 영국 노르섬프토실르 소 왓르빌에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Holand(은)는 59세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret(은)는 46세였다. 그녀는 1422년 이전 Sir Roger Fiennes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1441년 4월 영국 수세스에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Hurstmonceux Castle, Hailsham, Sussex, E: Hailsham, Sūþsēaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Holand nasceu aproximadamente 1404, em Thorpe Waterville, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Holand, tinha 59 anos e sua mãe, Margaret, tinha 46 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Roger Fiennes antes 1422. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em abril de 1441, em Sussex, Inglaterra, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Holand родилась около 1404 г. в местности таурп вэитирвилл, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Holand было 59 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret, 46. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Roger Fiennes перед 1422 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла апрель 1441 г. в местности суссекс, Англия в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Holand nació aproximadamente 1404, en Thorpe Waterville, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Holand, tenía 59 años y su mamá, Margaret, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Sir Roger Fiennes antes de 1422. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en abril de 1441, en Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 38 años.
